description_long: This object is a medium-sized potted plant featuring broad, flat, dark green leaves with pointed tips, arranged on multiple slender stems. The leaves are slightly angular and have a geometric, stylized appearance, giving the plant a modern aesthetic. The stems emerge from a simple, smooth, cylindrical pot that is white or light gray in color, with no visible decorative elements. The pot is filled with a brownish substrate, likely representing soil, which is visible at the base of the stems. The plant's overall structure is upright and bushy, with leaves radiating outward in various directions, creating a sense of fullness. This type of potted plant is commonly used as a decorative element in urban environments, such as offices, lobbies, or residential interiors.
description: A modern potted plant with broad, angular green leaves on slender stems, set in a plain white cylindrical pot with visible soil. The plant has a full, upright structure and a clean, minimalist appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the plant's broadest leaves and the clean, round pot, with leaves fanning out to the left and right.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the angular spread of the leaves and the depth of the pot, with more stems visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the largest leaf and the dense cluster of stems emerging from the pot.
description_view_3: This angle shows the plant's leaves extending outward, with the pot's smooth surface clearly visible and less overlap of the leaves.
attribute_plant_species: Bird of Paradise (Strelitzia reginae) or similar broad-leaf tropical plant
